```{r}
source("_utils.R")
```

```{r}
#| cache: true
#| cache-extra: !expr rlang::hash(params)
#| cache-file-1: !expr rlang::hash_file("_baseline_query_data.R")
source("_baseline_query_data.R")
```

# Distributions of Features (Continuous)

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Assessment set

```{r feature_dist_assess_cont_transform}
cont_chars_assess_long_new <- assessment_data_new %>%
  select(all_of(continuous_preds)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = "predictor",
    values_to = "value"
  )
```

```{r feature_dist_assess_cont_plot}
#| column: screen-inset
#| fig-height: !expr fig_height(cont_chars_assess_long_new)

plot_small_multiple_histograms(cont_chars_assess_long_new, stat = "bin")
```

```{r feature_dist_assess_cont_cleanup}
#| output: false

rm(cont_chars_assess_long_new)
gc()
```

### Training set

```{r feature_dist_train_cont_transform}
cont_chars_train_long_new <- training_data_new %>%
  select(all_of(continuous_preds)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = everything(),
    names_to = "predictor",
    values_to = "value"
  )
```

```{r feature_dist_train_cont_plot}
#| column: screen-inset
#| fig-height: !expr fig_height(cont_chars_train_long_new)

plot_small_multiple_histograms(cont_chars_train_long_new, stat = "bin")
```

```{r feature_dist_train_cont_cleanup}
#| output: false

rm(cont_chars_train_long_new)
gc()
```

:::

# Distribution of SHAPs (Continuous)

```{r shap_dist_cont_transform}
#| eval: !expr isTRUE(shap_exists)

cont_shap_long_new <- shaps_new %>%
  select(meta_pin, meta_card_num, all_of(continuous_preds)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(continuous_preds),
    names_to = "predictor",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    shaps_new %>%
      select(meta_pin, meta_card_num, all_of(continuous_shaps)) %>%
      pivot_longer(
        cols = all_of(continuous_shaps),
        names_to = "shap_name",
        values_to = "shap_value"
      ) %>%
      mutate(shap_name = str_replace(shap_name, "_shap$", "")),
    by = c("meta_pin", "meta_card_num", "predictor" = "shap_name")
  )
```


```{r create_fig_height_shap_cont}
fig_height_shap <- if (exists("cont_shap_long_old")) {
  fig_height(cont_shap_long_old, ncol = ncol_line)
} else {
  4
}

if (!exists("fig_height_shap_cont")) {
  print("No SHAP values were created for this model run")
}
```

```{r shap_dist_cont_plot}
#| eval: !expr isTRUE(shap_exists)
#| column: screen-inset
#| fig-height: !expr fig_height_shap

plot_small_multiple_lines(
  cont_shap_long_new,
  "shap_value",
  y_axis_label = "SHAP Value"
)
```

```{r shap_dist_cont_cleanup}
#| eval: !expr isTRUE(shap_exists)
#| output: false

rm(cont_shap_long_new)
gc()
```
